claims.claim: The study finds that mapping information through an interpretable token bottleneck reduces DiffusionGemma's opaque serial depth to exactly 1.1X that of Gemma 4 with no decrease in downstream performance, demonstrating that DiffusionGemma achieves the same level of variable transparency as Gemma 4.
UNIEGO is trained with a total of thirteen distinct sources of supervision, comprising nine teachers and four foundation models.
The paper states that because StylisticBias keeps identity fixed while varying one attribute at a time, the benchmark isolates causal effects of visual attributes on MLLM social judgments.
The abstract states that the model exhibits both continuous and discontinuous transitions from full synchrony to partial synchrony, totaling at least three distinct transition types.
The hexplot model is equipped with the Fisher metric on the standard triangle itself, rather than a metric derived from it.
The Bellman-function proof establishes a dimension-free estimate for the vector of Riesz transforms on the Hamming cube with a total multiplicative constant of exactly (p-1) across all 2 ≤ p < ∞.

The paper finds that between 1952 and 1986, the state channelled a cumulative net inflow of approximately 168.6 billion yuan into agriculture, with the sole extraction period of 1952–1957 already netted out of this total figure.

The paper states that the 1979 procurement price increase had a negligible impact on agricultural supply because its price elasticity approached zero, indicating that the price increase functioned solely as a one-time recalibration of incentives.
The contract states that overlapping predictor sets are more effective than hierarchically clustered groups for variable selection.

elma estimates bar length by identifying the semi-major axis corresponding to the global maximum in the radial ellipticity profile, then uses the image WCS and a user-supplied redshift to convert this angular measurement into a projected physical length.
elma converts angular measurements into projected physical lengths by using image WCS information and a user-supplied redshift, requiring both inputs for every calculation.
The abstract states that the merger shock in A2142 strips and rolls the jet cocoon into a toroidal vortex, producing the observed radio arcs as confirmed vortex ring structures.
The paper finds a line of fixed points at the critical ratio Δ/κ = 2π, marking the onset of a marginal vertex instability.
The abstract states that the proposed framework outperforms heuristic optimization benchmarks while achieving lower computational time than the comparable MIMO downlink NOMA system.

The contract defines the 'tempered Skew-t' distribution as the one that directly results from applying the Jones-Faddy symmetry-breaking mechanism to the 'capped Inverse Gamma' stationary distribution for stochastic volatility.

The abstract reports that the variances of the accumulated multi-day S&P500 return distributions exhibit near perfect linear dependence on the number of days of accumulation, and that the mean values show an even stronger such linear dependence.
The paper establishes that stronger synchronization among agents increases collective output while also increasing systemic fragility and reducing mobility.
The proposed two-stage framework jointly optimizes a total of three distinct system parameters—PA positions, base-station transmit precoding, and power allocation—across both stages combined.
